name: San Antonio Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Can (Rinsed and drained) Black beans
Red bell pepper, sliced into strips
Hard-cooked eggs, cut into wedges or slices (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vegetables, beans, and bacon in a large bowl.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the Picante Sauce, Italian dressing, and ground cumin.
3. Pour the sauce mixture over the vegetables in the large bowl.
4. Toss lightly to coat with the dressing.
5. Chill the salad for about 30 minutes.
6. Toss again before serving.
7. Garnish with eggs if desired.
8. Serve with additional Picante Sauce on top.
Makes about 7 1/2 cups of salad.
